(610)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: K.J. PETSAS, ESQ., 650.624.8155; No other appearances.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT GRANTS K.J. PETSAS, ESQ.'S (LAW OFFICES OF PETSAS & STEPHENS LLP) MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF LOUIS IRIZARRY. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LOUIS IRIZARRY'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is off calendar. The May 22, 2013 mail service without an order shortening time is untimely under CCP 1005. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Off Calendar May-13-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LOUIS IRIZARRY's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is off calendar. The Court did not receive a courtesy copy of the motion or a proof of service in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
